Blog

Claude Code 1.0 is here

March 15, 2024

We are excited to announce the general availability of Claude Code, our terminal-based coding assistant.

Introducing hooks in Claude Code

February 1, 2024

Hooks let you run custom shell commands at key lifecycle events during a Claude Code session.

Claude Code IDE integrations

January 10, 2024

Use Claude Code directly inside VS Code and JetBrains IDEs.
